name: Munchkin Sterilizer Microwave Bags
desc: Throw your bottle parts in a ziplock-looking bag, nuke it for 90 seconds, and call it sterile. Each bag is reusable up to 20 times — because nothing says "parenting" like tracking your bag's use count.

name: Frida Mom Postpartum Recovery Underwear
desc: Hospital-grade mesh underwear sold as a luxury product. Stretchy, enormous, and according to every mother alive, the most comfortable thing they've ever worn. Humbling and iconic.

name: Owlet Cam 2 Smart Baby Monitor
desc: A 1080p HD camera that lets you watch your baby sleep from your phone at 3am instead of just... going back to sleep yourself. Includes night vision and cry detection.

name: Fridababy DermaFrida The SkinSoother
desc: A silicone brush that looks like a tiny waffle iron attachment designed specifically to scrub cradle cap off your baby's head. Sounds aggressive. Parents love it.

name: Summer Infant Comfy Clean Deluxe Bather
desc: A mesh sling that hangs over the sink so you can bathe a newborn with both hands free and zero risk of dropping a slippery wet baby. The name "Comfy Clean" is doing a lot of work here.

name: Ergobaby Omni 360 Baby Carrier
desc: A carrier with four carrying positions including facing out, facing in, hip, and back. Takes 20 minutes to figure out the first time. Then you never take it off.

name: Dr. Brown's Anti-Colic Bottle Warmer
desc: A warmer that uses steam to heat bottles to body temperature in under 4 minutes. Because apparently nobody has time to put a bottle in warm tap water anymore.

name: Nanit Pro Smart Baby Monitor + Breathing Band
desc: A camera that mounts above the crib AND a little band the baby wears on their stomach to detect breathing motion. For parents who want to turn anxiety into a subscription service.

name: Boppy Newborn Lounger
desc: A little foam nest that lets your baby lounge like a tiny Roman emperor while you do dishes. Recalled once, redesigned, still extremely popular. The drama only made it more famous.

name: Water Wipes Original Baby Wipes
desc: Wipes made from 99.9% water and a drop of fruit extract. Yes, just water. In a wipe. Parents pay a premium for this. Dermatologists approve. Economics students weep.

name: Hatch Rest 2nd Gen Sound Machine + Night Light
desc: A smart sound machine and night light that you control from your phone in bed so you never have to get up to adjust the volume. Fully worth it. Completely ridiculous. Both.

name: Tummy Time Water Mat
desc: An inflatable mat filled with water and floating sea creatures designed to make tummy time less miserable for everyone involved. Baby stares at fish. You eat breakfast.

name: Baby Banana Bendable Training Toothbrush
desc: A bright yellow toothbrush shaped like a banana that babies hold and chew on themselves. It's shaped like a banana. That's the whole product. 4.7 stars, 15,000 reviews.

name: Frida Baby 3-in-1 True Temp Thermometer
desc: One thermometer that works in the ear, on the forehead, AND rectally. The box lists all three modes with equal enthusiasm. Comes with a color-coded fever alert.

name: Doona Infant Car Seat & Stroller
desc: A car seat that unfolds into a stroller with the push of a button. No base swap, no transfer. Extremely clever. Also costs roughly as much as a used car.

name: Mustela Foam Shampoo for Newborns
desc: A no-rinse foam shampoo for babies who don't have much hair yet but apparently still need a $14 product for it. Smells incredible. Disappears in two weeks.

name: Skip Hop Explore & More Baby's View Activity Center
desc: An enormous plastic activity saucer with 26 ways to play, a rotating seat, lights, music, and enough stimulation to mildly overwhelm an adult. Folds flat. Barely.

name: Snoo Smart Sleeper Bassinet
desc: A bassinet that automatically rocks and shushes your baby when it detects crying, using an algorithm. Made by the guy who wrote "Happiest Baby on the Block." Costs more than most people's first car.

name: Copper Pearl Burp Cloths (6-Pack)
desc: Burp cloths that are thick, triple-layered, and actually absorbent unlike the decorative rectangles that come in gift sets. Parents who own these talk about them unprompted at parties.

name: Frida Baby 2-in-1 Postpartum Peri Bottle
desc: A curved squirt bottle for postpartum recovery that is angled so you don't have to contort yourself. Simple concept. Life-changing execution. Every nurse recommends it.
